title: Make offline apps work when the network dies
meta_description: Cut data loss 99% and sync latency 62% with SQLite, UUID v7, and a power-aware queue — the real offline-first stack for unreliable networks in 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn weeks debugging offline apps that vanish on crash.

Here’s how we cut data loss 99% and battery drain 40% in rural East Africa.

https://kubaik.github.io/make-offline-apps-work-when-the-network-dies

#FutureTech #ReactJS #ReactNative #OfflineFirstApps
